click_row_endpoint_stats: Click on any row to get corresponding endpoint stats
filter_query_placeholder: Enter your filter query (e.g., deployment.environment = 'otel-demo' AND service.name = 'frontend')
cancelled_load_data: Click "Run Query" to load API monitoring data.
no_external_api_calls: No External API calls detected with applied filters.
ensure_http_client_spans: Ensure all HTTP client spans are being sent with kind as <0>Client</0> and url set in <1>url.full</1> or <2>http.url</2> attribute.
learn_external_api: Learn how External API monitoring works in SigNoz
tooltip_status_message_exists: When enabled, shows errors that have a status message. When disabled, shows all errors regardless of status message
tooltip_shows_with_status: Shows errors that have a status message
tooltip_shows_all: Shows all errors regardless of status message
empty_disable_toggle: Please disable "Status Message Exists" toggle to see all errors
query_no_results: This query had no results. Edit your query and try again!
error_ran_into: Uh-oh :/ We ran into an error.
select_endpoint_to_see: Select an endpoint to see the details
